data.content: Needs changes. Remaining violation against the knot description: docs/audit/workflow-operations-map.md still contains prompt-guidance references at lines 442 and 537 by documenting checkPromptGuidance in the individual checks list and Doctor/health workflow map, but that check has been removed from code. README/docs cleanup is therefore incomplete. Runtime packaging is fixed (scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh no longer copies PROMPT.md), setup/install prompt-guidance flows were removed, rollback tests remain intact, and sanity gates passed in /private/tmp/foolery-9c9a-r2: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
